---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve STELLA
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **STELLA Version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Deployment**: [e.g., Kubernetes, Docker Compose, Local]
- **Kubernetes Version** (if applicable): [e.g., 1.28]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g., 20.x]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.11]
- **OS**: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- **Browser** (if frontend issue): [e.g., Chrome 120]

## Logs

If applicable, add relevant logs from:

```
# Backend logs
kubectl logs -n ai-agents -l app=stella-backend

# Agent logs
kubectl logs -n ai-agents -l app=agent
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
